the reason your ai ugc sounds fake has nothing to do with the voice clone

elevenlabs produces studio-quality audio. and that's the problem. a character filmed in their bedroom with audio that sounds like it was recorded on a $3,000 mic.

your brain catches it before you can

the ai video model that generates the best quality right now is completely irrelevant to whether you make money

i know people clearing $10k/month who exclusively use kling 2.0

not even the latest version. never tried seedance. never tried sora 2.

they picked one model a year

We ALL paid each other in full, on time and never asked for discounts.

I've always been drawn to platforms where you can force growth.

Facebook in the early days:

- Add 50 people a day.
- Invite people to your FB group.
- Grow your followers and group.
- Build an audience fast.

It worked.

X/Twitter:

- Run a giveaway.
